title: cynoglossum clusii
intro: Cynoglossum clusii, also known as Clusius's Hound's Tongue, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Cynoglossum clusii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an expectorant to aid in the relief of coughs and bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
